text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

[ Fixed in revision 1.267 of LINT ] 

I applied the fix you submitted, slightly edited.  Instead of: 

#options               "MAXMEM=131072" 

I used: 

#options               "MAXMEM=128*1024" 

And also explained used this number in the comments.
